tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This work will be completed tomorrow. This problem can be solved. This rule should be followed. This form must be filled. This letter will be sent tomorrow.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This mistake can be corrected. This decision should be taken quickly. This information must be kept secret. This project will be started next month. This question can be asked easily.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "यह किताब पढ़ी जानी चाहिए।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "This form must be filled yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Passive Voice Part 2 — Future & Modals का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This meeting will be called next week. This can be made better. This notice should be read by every student. This work must be completed on time.
